title: [1.2] Bump c/storage to v1.24.8 and c/image to v5.10.5 for RHEL 8.4
body:
Bump c/storage to v1.24.8 and c/image to v5.10.5 for RHEL 8.4 in release-1.2

Does the last vendor dance for RHEL 8.4

Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

comments.body: I noticed that this PR was opened from an upstream branch (not from the fork). Please be careful with pushing to upstream branches; it could easily overwrite branches.
